_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in writing well-structured, tested, and documented SQL transformations that produce reliable, reusable datasets for analytics consumers.
comments: NICE skill intersects with WIDAI TF domain. Skill TF-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-T-007 (DA, cosine: 0.590), LS-S-003 (LS, cosine: 0.578).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.7/10 (raw 0.668). Shared vocabulary: [analytics, skill]. NICE-only terms [performing, transformation] vs WIDAI-only terms [consumers, datasets, documented, produce, reliable, reusable] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.880 (P=0.924, R=0.840). P exceeds R by 0.084 — the NICE element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Skill in performing transformation analytics" and "Skill in writing well-structured, tested, and documented SQL transformations tha" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.626 ≈ STS 0.668 (gap 0.042). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [analytics, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.0%. Shared tokens: [analytics, skill]. NICE-only: [performing, transformation]. WIDAI-only: [consumers, datasets, documented, produce, reliable, reusable].
